name: buzzwole
flavor_texts: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.
A mysterious life-form called an Ultra Beast. Witnesses saw it pulverize a dump truck with a single punch.
Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.
Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.
text: Buzzwole is the Swollen Pokémon. It is a bug and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: beast-boost. Base stats — HP: 107, Attack: 139, Defense: 139, Sp. Atk: 53, Sp. Def: 53, Speed: 79. Evolution line: buzzwole. Lore: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear. A mysterious life-form called an Ultra Beast. Witnesses saw it pulverize a dump truck with a single punch. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.
